title: Power Integrations (NASDAQ:POWI) Shares Gap Up After Dividend Announcement
text: Power Integrations announced a quarterly dividend of $0.215 per share payable on June 30, 2026, with an ex-date on May 29, 2026 and record date on May 29, 2026. This represents a $0.86 annualized dividend and a dividend yield of 1.2%. The announcement came alongside the company's first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of $108.31 million and net income of $3.3 million. The dividend announcement coincided with strong Q1 earnings results and strategic announcements including the appointment of new sales leadership. This marks a shift for the company, signaling management's confidence in future cash generation and commitment to returning capital to shareholders.
